source: City of Atlanta DOT — Project Meeting Q&A, April 14, 2026

features.name: Virginia Ave
features.title: Full traffic signal — Virginia Ave
features.description: Upgraded full traffic signal. Phase II intersection improvement; right-of-way acquisition here.
features.quote: Full traffic signals are located at: Virginia Ave, Amsterdam Ave, Worchester Dr, Dutch Valley Rd, Ansley Mall Driveway, and Montgomery Ferry Dr.

features.name: Amsterdam Ave
features.title: Full traffic signal — Amsterdam Ave
features.description: Upgraded full traffic signal.
features.quote: Full traffic signals are located at: Virginia Ave, Amsterdam Ave, Worchester Dr, Dutch Valley Rd, Ansley Mall Driveway, and Montgomery Ferry Dr.

features.name: Worcester Dr
features.title: Full traffic signal — Worcester Dr
features.description: Upgraded full traffic signal.
features.quote: Full traffic signals are located at: Virginia Ave, Amsterdam Ave, Worchester Dr, Dutch Valley Rd, Ansley Mall Driveway, and Montgomery Ferry Dr.

features.name: Dutch Valley Rd
features.title: Full traffic signal — Dutch Valley Rd
features.description: Upgraded full traffic signal.
features.quote: Full traffic signals are located at: Virginia Ave, Amsterdam Ave, Worchester Dr, Dutch Valley Rd, Ansley Mall Driveway, and Montgomery Ferry Dr.

features.name: Ansley Mall Driveway
features.title: Full traffic signal — Ansley Mall Driveway
features.description: Upgraded full traffic signal at the Ansley Mall driveway. Within the segment that retains four lanes.
features.quote: Full traffic signals are located at: ... Ansley Mall Driveway, and Montgomery Ferry Dr.

features.name: Montgomery Ferry Dr
features.title: Full signal + safety rebuild — Montgomery Ferry Dr
features.description: Left-turn signals and congestion relief. Raised center median island on the north leg, upgraded ADA ramps and crosswalks, and up to 4 ft of pavement widening north of the intersection to reduce the northbound skew and run-off-road crashes. Right-of-way acquisition here.
features.quote: The proposed safety improvements ... maintaining an 11-foot northbound travel lane: minor widening of the edge of pavement ... up to four feet north of the intersection to provide a less severe skew ... upgraded ADA ramps and crosswalks, and installation of a center raised median on the northern leg of the intersection.

features.name: Roundabout (~Park Dr)
features.title: New roundabout (replaces a signal)
features.description: One of the 10 existing signals along the corridor is replaced with a roundabout, within the Phase II segment (8th St through Park Dr).
features.quote: One of the 10 existing signals will be replaced with a roundabout...

features.name: Westminster Dr
features.title: Pedestrian Hybrid Beacon — Westminster Dr
features.description: New Pedestrian Hybrid Beacon (PHB) — pedestrian-actuated signal that stops traffic for crossings.
features.quote: PHBs are located at: Westminster Dr and the Publix property.

features.name: Publix property
features.title: Pedestrian Hybrid Beacon — Publix property
features.description: New Pedestrian Hybrid Beacon (PHB) at the Publix property crossing (Ansley Mall).
features.quote: PHBs are located at: Westminster Dr and the Publix property.

features.name: Ansley Mall mid-block
features.title: PHB — Ansley Mall mid-block crossing
features.description: New Pedestrian Hybrid Beacon at a mid-block crossing with a center median island in front of Ansley Mall, connecting the mall to the Atlanta BeltLine along Montgomery Ferry Dr.
features.quote: a Pedestrian Hybrid Beacon at new mid-block crossing with a center median island in front of Ansley Mall will provide connectivity ... to the Atlanta BeltLine.

features.name: Ansley Circle–Piedmont Rd
features.title: PHB — between Ansley Circle & Piedmont Rd
features.description: One of two new signalized crossings added between Montgomery Ferry Dr and Piedmont Rd for transit users.
features.quote: A Pedestrian Hybrid Beacon will be between Ansley Circle and Piedmont Rd ...

features.name: Cresthill Ave
features.title: RRFB — Cresthill Ave
features.description: New Rectangular Rapid Flashing Beacon (RRFB) — pedestrian-actuated flashing warning at a marked crosswalk.
features.quote: RRFBs are located at: Cresthill Ave, Elmwood Dr, Orme Cir, Yorkshire Dr, Kroger property, and Rock Springs Rd.

features.name: Elmwood Dr
features.title: RRFB — Elmwood Dr
features.description: New Rectangular Rapid Flashing Beacon (RRFB).
features.quote: RRFBs are located at: Cresthill Ave, Elmwood Dr, Orme Cir, Yorkshire Dr, Kroger property, and Rock Springs Rd.

features.name: Orme Cir
features.title: RRFB — Orme Cir
features.description: New Rectangular Rapid Flashing Beacon (RRFB).
features.quote: RRFBs are located at: Cresthill Ave, Elmwood Dr, Orme Cir, Yorkshire Dr, Kroger property, and Rock Springs Rd.

features.name: Yorkshire Rd
features.title: RRFB + permitted left turn — Yorkshire Rd
features.description: New RRFB. A left turn from Yorkshire Rd onto Monroe Dr will remain permitted.
features.quote: RRFBs are located at: ... Yorkshire Dr ...  Yes, a left from Yorkshire Rd onto Monroe Dr will be permitted.

features.name: Kroger property
features.title: RRFB — Kroger property
features.description: New Rectangular Rapid Flashing Beacon (RRFB) at the Kroger property crossing (north of Ansley Mall).
features.quote: RRFBs are located at: ... Kroger property, and Rock Springs Rd.

features.name: Rock Springs Rd
features.title: RRFB — Rock Springs Rd
features.description: New Rectangular Rapid Flashing Beacon (RRFB).
features.quote: RRFBs are located at: ... and Rock Springs Rd.

features.name: Ansley Circle–Montgomery Ferry
features.title: RRFB — between Ansley Circle & Montgomery Ferry Dr
features.description: One of two new signalized crossings added between Montgomery Ferry Dr and Piedmont Rd for transit users.
features.quote: a Reflective Rapid Flashing Beacon will be installed between Ansley Circle and Montgomery Ferry Dr.

features.name: Cumberland Rd
features.title: Intersection realignment — Cumberland Rd
features.description: Alignment adjusted to shorten the pedestrian crossing across Cumberland Rd by ~30 ft, improve sight lines, simplify movements, and slow right-turning vehicles onto Monroe Dr.
features.quote: The alignment of the intersection has been adjusted to reduce the length for the pedestrian crossing across Cumberland Rd by approximately 30-feet...

features.name: Sherwood Rd
features.title: Intersection realignment — Sherwood Rd
features.description: Alignment adjusted to shorten the pedestrian crossing across Sherwood Rd by ~40 ft, improve sight lines, and slow right-turning vehicles onto Sherwood Rd.
features.quote: The alignment of the intersection has been adjusted to reduce the length for the pedestrian crossing across Sherwood Rd by approximately 40 feet...

features.name: Piedmont Ave & Monroe
features.title: Curb & ADA upgrades — Piedmont Ave
features.description: Each corner receives upgraded curb lines and ADA ramps to better define the vehicle travel path and shorten pedestrian crossings. Northern end of the segment that retains four lanes.
features.quote: Each corner of the intersection will receive upgraded curb lines and ADA ramps to better define the vehicle travel path and provide shorter pedestrian crossings.

features.name: Kanuga St
features.title: Intersection reconfiguration — Kanuga St
features.description: Reconfigured concurrently with the 10th St & Monroe Dr intersection to incorporate roadway and BeltLine improvements.
features.quote: The present intersection reconfiguration at Kanuga St and Monroe Dr and the intersection at 10th St and Monroe Dr were concurrently designed...

features.name: 10th St & BeltLine
features.title: BeltLine crossing + all-stop ped phase — 10th St
features.description: Key Atlanta BeltLine access point. Existing all-stop (pedestrian scramble) phase; safe bicycle crossing of Monroe Dr incorporated. Excluded from the 22 side-street count and treated as a signature crossing.
features.quote: There is already an all-stop phase for pedestrian crossings at the 10th St intersection... Opportunities for safe bicycle crossing of Monroe Dr at the BeltLine/10th St intersection ... have been incorporated.

features.name: Park Dr SE bike crossing
features.title: Bicycle crossing — Park Dr SE
features.description: Safe bicycle crossing of Monroe Dr incorporated at Park Dr SE (bike lanes are not included along Monroe itself).
features.quote: Opportunities for safe bicycle crossing of Monroe Dr at the BeltLine/10th St intersection and Park Dr SE have been incorporated...
